news.paragraph: JPMorgan is focusing on technological innovation through AI and blockchain investments, including a recent filing to launch a new tokenized money market fund. While the asset and wealth management business demonstrated strength in the first quarter, the firm is also preparing for a leadership overhaul in its investment banking division. These product developments and management shifts represent key factors for traders to monitor.
headlines: JPMorgan Chase & Co (JPM): Funding AI Projects With Eyes on Blockchain
